description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban winter attire, featuring a long, double-breasted coat with wide lapels and metallic buttons, layered over a hooded sweatshirt. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and his hair is styled in a bun at the back of his head. He wears fitted pants tucked into sturdy, lace-up combat boots, and his hands are covered with gloves. The coat has visible straps and buckles on the sleeves, adding a rugged, utilitarian touch. The overall appearance suggests a modern, streetwise individual prepared for cold weather. The figure's stance is upright with arms extended horizontally, as if in a T-pose.
description: A bearded adult male in a long urban coat, hooded sweatshirt, gloves, fitted pants, and combat boots, styled for cold weather. His hair is tied in a bun and he has a rugged, streetwise look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, beard, layered coat with hood, gloves, and boots, with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, bun hairstyle, coat's side, and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat, hood, bun hairstyle, and the symmetrical outstretched arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, bun, and side of the coat and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long winter coat over a hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, gloves, and combat boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a bun
